channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLpolitics
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLpolitics, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Scoop: Pulte sought Gabbard's early removal as intel czar
item.description: Tulsi Gabbard, the outgoing director of national intelligence, received an unexpected call Tuesday from her controversial successor, Bill Pulte: "Today i...

item.title: Trump's dismissive comments on inflation give Democrats ready-made midterm ads
item.description: President Trump's recent rhetorical missteps could hurt Republicans in the midterms. His remarks provide Democrats with campaign material.

item.title: Global tournament faces strict home-field policies
item.description: President Trump praised the 2026 FIFA World Cup as a chance to highlight American exceptionalism and global unity on U.S. soil.

item.title: Congress joins backlash against data centers
item.description: Members of Congress are increasingly opposing data centers as local communities across the country push back against them.
